description: Conservative preservation/review pack for TRichView, ScaleRichView, ReportWorkshop, and RVMedia components. TRichView offers FireMonkey support, but rich document, printing, media, and reporting behavior must be verified in the target project.

rules.notes: TRichView has FMX support, so preserving the class may be appropriate when the FMX packages are installed.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify FMX package references, document loading, styles, embedded images, hyperlinks, and printing/export behavior.

rules.notes: Rich text editing may be preserved with FMX TRichView packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review editor commands, popup menus, spell-check integration, drag/drop, and platform-specific input behavior.
Data-aware rich document controls require review with the target dataset/binding strategy.
Data-aware rich editing requires manual dataset, field, update, and LiveBindings review.

rules.notes: Style component may be reusable with TRichView FMX components.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify style ownership, fonts, colors, paragraph styles, and document compatibility.
ScaleRichView/page-layout behavior is report/document-specific and should not be automatically converted.
Printing/export paths are framework and platform specific.
Report helper integration requires report-specific migration.
RVMedia camera/video behavior depends on devices, codecs, and platform permissions.
RVMedia audio behavior depends on platform permissions and capture devices.
